text.title: eu-ai-act-compliance Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for eu-ai-act-compliance as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hidden AI use — responding to customer without disclosing AI.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Article 50 violation. Users interacting with AI must be informed at the earliest opportunity.

failure-mode.description: Silent emotion detection on audio/video without user consent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Emotion recognition in workplace or education settings is prohibited under Article 5 without explicit consent and lawful basis.

failure-mode.description: Fully automated rejection of employment applications without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Article 14 requires human oversight capability in high-risk systems; automated rejection with no override path violates the requirement.
